basics.name: Jiale 'Jess' Zhang
basics.summary: Graduate student in evolutionary biology studying mammalian response to environmental changes.

education.area: Ph.D. in Ecology and Evolution, Biological Sciences
B.S. in Fisheries, Wildlife and Conservation Biology

languages.fluency: Fluent in speaking, reading, and writing

presentations.name: Country Mice and City Mice: High-resolution µCT Scans Reveals City Mice are, In Fact, Brainier
presentations.event: University of Minnesota Undergraduate Research Symposium

teaching.institution: University of Illinois Chicago, Department of Biological Sciences
teaching.description: 24 undergruaduate junior/senior students enrolled. Course includes lectures and labs covering basic molecular biology techniques, including DNA extraction, PCR, gel electrophoresis, Sanger sequencing, and CRISPR technology. Students also learn how to analyze and interpret genetic data.
